headline: McIlroy (Molmen) won back-to-back Masters titles, beating Scheffler (Wu) by one shot. Henley (Jens) T3. Alcaraz (Todd) vs Sinner (Buckley) in the Monte Carlo final today. NHL playoffs begin Wednesday — Avalanche (Korch), Lightning (Fryar), and Golden Knights (Tim) all in.
